notes: Only the succinct description has a published word limit in the public guidance reviewed. Confirm any portal-specific limits for the remaining prompts.

routes.label: General entry
routes.applies_when: Eligible current or recent design/engineering student or graduate entry.

fields.label: Succinct description
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the invention's purpose, the problem, the solution, and how it functions in one concise account.

fields.label: Inspiration and motivation
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the observed need and why the team chose to address it.

fields.label: How it works
fields.drafting_instructions: Describe the operating principle clearly enough to distinguish the invention from an aspiration.

fields.label: Development process
fields.drafting_instructions: Show how research, prototypes, tests, and iterations changed the design.

fields.label: What makes it different
fields.drafting_instructions: Compare against evidenced alternatives and state the defensible novelty.

fields.label: Future plans
fields.drafting_instructions: Separate completed work from planned validation, manufacture, launch, or scale-up.
